title: • Power dynamics shifting through the course
content:
• Power dynamics shifting through the course

✔ C. Random Events & Mid-Semester Chaos Events
• Triggers for The Great Reset, Faction War, or the Trial
• Probability calculations for weekly narrative changes

✔ D. Hidden Unlock Conditions for Special Challenges
• Certain player choices will reveal hidden paths.
• Special class-wide events only trigger if specific conditions are met.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Allows full instructor control over hidden influences.
✔ Balances fairness & unpredictability.
✔ Gives real-time adjustment tools based on student engagement.

📌 FINAL FINAL LOCK-IN QUESTIONS BEFORE EXECUTION

1. How should we visually present all these layers in a usable format?
